project_description: A high-precision, dark-mode financial dashboard for tracking multi-company finances, income, expenses, and personnel.

design_philosophy.visual_style: Jewel & Luxury Dark Mode. Deep obsidian backgrounds with electric indigo and emerald accents. Glassmorphism for depth.
design_philosophy.theme_strategy: Dark Mode Preferred. The interface should default to dark mode for a professional 'Bloomberg Terminal' aesthetic.

Card.style: bg-card border border-border shadow-sm rounded-xl overflow-hidden relative

Button.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(99,102,241,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-lg font-medium px-6 py-2
Button.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-lg font-medium px-6 py-2
Button.outline: border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-lg font-medium px-6 py-2

Input.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-lg border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all duration-200

Table.wrapper: relative w-full overflow-auto rounded-xl border border-border bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-sm
Table.header: bg-muted/50 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-muted-foreground

Sidebar.wrapper: fixed left-0 top-0 z-40 h-screen w-64 border-r border-border bg-card/95 backdrop-blur-xl flex flex-col
Sidebar.link: flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-muted-foreground transition-all hover:text-foreground hover:bg-accent

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Run 'npm install lucide-react recharts framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge cva' if not installed.
THEME SETUP: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the colors provided in 'colors.palette'. Ensure 'darkMode' is set to 'class'.
GLOBAL CSS: Update 'index.css' root variables to match the HSL values in 'colors.palette'. CRITICAL: Override both ':root' (for light mode backup) and '.dark' classes.
LAYOUT: Create a 'Layout.js' component that includes the Sidebar and a top Header. Use 'Outlet' from react-router-dom for page content.
CHARTS: Use 'ResponsiveContainer' from Recharts. Style Tooltips with 'contentStyle={{ backgroundColor: "#1e293b", borderColor: "#334155" }}'.
TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
DATA: Mock data for the dashboard should be realistic Turkish Lira figures (e.g., ₺145.000,00).
LANGUAGE: The interface MUST be in Turkish (Gelirler, Giderler, Personel, Özet, Ayarlar).
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use grid-based, high-density layouts for data.
Use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur) for the sidebar and header.
Never use pure black (#000000). Use the Deep Obsidian (#0F111A) provided.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast. Use 'text-muted-foreground' for labels, 'text-foreground' for values.
Add 'hover:scale-[1.02]' transitions to cards for a tactile feel.
Use 'sonner' for notifications (Success: Green, Error: Red).
